title: Better Update Suppression
description: Better Update Suppression, freedom for update suppression
body:
# Better Update Suppression

## How to Use?

1. Download `BetterUpdateSuppression-1.0.1jar` and place it in the mods folder
2. Use the command to give yourself the update suppression block
    ```
    /give @s better_update_suppression:update_suppression_block 64
    ```
   or craft using 1 detector and 8 redstone dust
   ![-1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76e771a7a3e850b28f6bfbdbb803575dff8fee4a.png)
3. Build the structure before performing update suppression (using a nether portal as an example)
   ![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/802dc4afa012dfd47c04e00eef0b499c681d8ba8.png)
4. Place the `Update Suppression Block` directly adjacent to the block that needs to be suppressed
   ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2395c0bcf6f8fde570d0d218c7456f02da1f909c.png)
5. Right-click the `Update Suppression Block`; when the center gray part turns red, it is activated
   ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0694146f3569e514511fca2b00feb38b5c72356.png)
6. Break the obsidian! This will trigger update suppression, and the nether portal will not break
   ![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2de518a6647a449709dd75ca1dc8f5eb3bca07a.png)
7. Right-click the `Update Suppression Block` again to deactivate it; the center red part will turn back to gray
   ![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99118021e61e16c8e5150a6d43c7079966509792.png)
8. Break the `Update Suppression Block`
   ![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a44eae92114f68f0247c775afb2dd3bd73d1da6f.png)
9. Repeat the process to remove all the obsidian (accidentally missed one)
   ![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02e33f99bfa12885efd35cc2ba3bc77119d1723f.png)

## Important Notes
1. Update suppression can cause server crashes at best and world corruption at worst. **Back up your save before using it!!! Extremely important!!!**
2. How to avoid server/world crashes?
    - Enable update suppression crash protection in carpet mod
    - Do not place two `Update Suppression Blocks` directly adjacent to each other, even if they are not activated
    - Operate slowly and carefully, do not rush

Required mods: Fabric API
